description: Proficiency at the advanced level in listening, speaking, reading and writing, using communicative approaches. Students with prior experience in the language are required to take a placement test administered by the department. Not open to students with credit for LCA LANG 558 prior to Fall 2019.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 335(or LCA LANG 557 prior to Fall 2019) or placement intoASIALANG 336
